title: Optimism Single-Asset Candidate Packet v1
why_this_asset: OptimismPortal is an in-scope smart-contract asset.
It is the primary OP Stack deposit and withdrawal interface.
It exposes local-only reviewable invariants around withdrawal proof, finalization, replay protection, target safety, l2Sender handling, and ETHLockbox accounting.
It has a known public direct-implementation stranded-funds edge case, so duplicate control is mandatory before any related idea moves forward.
recommended_first_invariants: opi-008 ETHLockbox accounting on failed withdrawal target call
next_action: Write optimism_portal_invariant_memo_v1 for exactly one invariant group; do not run fork tests, live tests, browser work, or submissions.
